summary: Tested all 8 features for the quote_requests cleanup, cart validation, and ProductForm subscription toggle batch. Backend: 13/13 PASS. Frontend: 8/8 PASS. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: Template download still returns 200/CSV for 'quote-requests' entity. The TEMPLATES, REQUIRED_FIELDS, JSON_FIELDS, and SAMPLE_DATA dicts in imports.py still contain quote-requests and override-codes entries despite these being removed from ENTITY_COLLECTIONS. The import endpoint (POST) correctly rejects them with 400, but the template download endpoint still serves them.
minor.priority: LOW - incomplete cleanup, no functional impact

issues: Console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in ProductForm Primitive.div render. Non-blocking but should be fixed.

test_results_detail.import_quote_requests_rejected: PASS - POST /api/admin/import/quote-requests returns 400: 'Unknown entity: quote-requests. Valid: ...'
test_results_detail.productform_subscription_internal: PASS - Subscription toggle visible when pricing_type='internal'
test_results_detail.productform_subscription_external: PASS - Subscription toggle NOT in DOM when pricing_type='external'
test_results_detail.productform_subscription_enquiry: PASS - Subscription toggle NOT in DOM when pricing_type='enquiry'
test_results_detail.productform_subscription_back_to_interna: PASS - Subscription toggle reappears when switching back to 'internal'
test_results_detail.cart_type_validation: PASS - Adding subscription (CAD, prod_bookkeeping) to cart with one-time (USD, prod_zoho_one_express) shows toast: 'Your cart already contains a one-time product. Please remove it before adding a subscription product — only one type of product is allowed per checkout.'
test_results_detail.cart_currency_validation: PASS - Adding AUD one-time (prod_hours_pack) to cart with USD one-time (prod_zoho_one_express) shows toast: 'Your cart contains USD products. All items must use the same currency — please remove existing items before adding AUD products.'
test_results_detail.cart_same_product_update: PASS - Adding same product again updates cart (navigates to /cart, cart still has 1 item, no error)

action_items: Low priority: Remove leftover quote-requests and override-codes entries from imports.py REQUIRED_FIELDS (lines 86, 91), JSON_FIELDS (line 78), TEMPLATES (lines 244-247, 263-266), and SAMPLE_DATA (lines 288, 293). These do not cause functional issues but are incomplete cleanup.
Low priority: Fix React key prop warning in ProductForm.tsx - 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in Primitive.div component.
critical_code_review_comments: imports.py: ENTITY_COLLECTIONS correctly removes quote-requests and override-codes, but REQUIRED_FIELDS, JSON_FIELDS, TEMPLATES, and SAMPLE_DATA still have these entities. The template download endpoint uses TEMPLATES (not ENTITY_COLLECTIONS) so it still serves templates for removed entities. Complete cleanup needed.
gdpr_service.py: quote_requests removal verified (lines 64-69 fetch and lines 237-247 anonymize are absent). PASS.
oauth.py: Both collection_maps at lines 1073-1077 and 1204-1208 correctly contain [customers, orders, subscriptions] without quote_requests. PASS.

test_credentials.note: Login WITHOUT partner_code for this admin user

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Iter121_Category via import test (auto-cleaned or not found during cleanup). Cart test used localStorage manipulation, no backend data created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 features from iteration 121 (quote_requests cleanup + cart validation + ProductForm subscription toggle) are working correctly. Backend tests: 13/13 pass (admin login works WITHOUT partner_code). Frontend tests: ProductForm pricing type toggle works via click on card buttons (Internal Checkout, External Link, Enquiry Only). Cart tests: Used localStorage seeding + product detail page. Products useful for testing: prod_zoho_one_express (USD, internal, one-time), prod_bookkeeping (CAD, internal, subscription), prod_hours_pack (AUD, internal, one-time), prod_dev_enterprise (USD, enquiry, not subscription). Minor leftover in imports.py: TEMPLATES/REQUIRED_FIELDS/JSON_FIELDS/SAMPLE_DATA still have quote-requests and override-codes (ENTITY_COLLECTIONS correctly removed them). Template download still serves CSVs for these. React key warning in ProductForm is non-blocking.

imports_incomplete_cleanup.root_cause: ENTITY_COLLECTIONS was updated to remove quote-requests and override-codes, but 4 other dicts (REQUIRED_FIELDS, JSON_FIELDS, TEMPLATES, SAMPLE_DATA) still retain entries for these removed entities. The import endpoint checks ENTITY_COLLECTIONS (correctly 400), but the template endpoint checks TEMPLATES (still serves 200).
imports_incomplete_cleanup.mitigation: Remove quote-requests and override-codes entries from all 4 dicts in imports.py
